- **Otherwise looks like a real game photo:** Lighting, motion blur, depth of field, crowd/background bokeh, court reflections, jersey fabric folds, and ball/hand interaction all appear internally consistent with a professional sports photograph. No obvious AI-art artifacts (warped anatomy, broken logos, impossible shadows) stand out.

- **No clear counterfactual visual elements:** The scene plausibly depicts an NBA game action moment; nothing in the image itself contradicts that.

**Conclusion:** The image appears to be an authentic sports photo with deliberate face-obscuring edits added afterward.
